issues_detail.description: Wrong namespace: using Xamarin.Forms instead of Microsoft.Maui.Controls
Deprecated API: DependencyService.Get<T>() - obsolete service locator pattern
issues_detail.fix: Replaced with constructor injection of ISettingsService

issues_detail.description: Wrong namespace in platform-specific API: Xamarin.Forms.PlatformConfiguration.iOS

notes: All issues identified and fixed using general knowledge of .NET MAUI migration from Xamarin.Forms without any skill guidance. The key changes reflect well-documented breaking changes in the Xamarin.Forms to .NET MAUI migration path.
